languages.text: "Чушь! Чем сильнее боль, тем быстрее прооперируют. Все высшие чины уже щеголяют новенькими визорами, и лишь я страдаю из-за какой-то соринки в глазу, как плебей".

traits.locale_text: "Чушь! Эта боль невыносима! Всем высшим чинам уже имплантировали визоры, и лишь я страдаю из-за какой-то соринки в глазу, как плебей..."

languages.text: "Rubbish! The worse the pain, the quicker you lot operate. All the upper-deckers are walking around with brand-new visors. I'm the only one suffering like a pleb over a speck in my eye."
languages.original_text: "Чушь! Чем сильнее боль, тем быстрее прооперируют. Все высшие чины уже щеголяют новенькими визорами, и лишь я страдаю из-за какой-то соринки в глазу, как плебей".

traits.locale_text: "Rubbish! The worse the pain, the quicker you lot operate. All the upper-deckers are walking around with brand-new visors. I'm the only one suffering like a pleb over a speck in my eye."
"Rubbish! The worse the pain, the quicker you lot operate. All the upper-deckers are walking around with brand-new visors. I'm the only one suffering like a pleb over a speck in my eye."
"Rubbish! The worse the pain, the quicker you lot operate. All the upper-deckers are walking around with brand-new visors. I'm the only one suffering like a pleb over a speck in my eye."

languages.text: 「そんなことないよ。痛みがひどければ、お前らほど早く手術するだろう。上甲板の全員が新品のゴーグルを付けて歩き回っているのに、俺は目のゴミで庶民のように苦しんでいるだけだ。」
languages.original_text: "Rubbish! The worse the pain, the quicker you lot operate. All the upper-deckers are walking around with brand-new visors. I'm the only one suffering like a pleb over a speck in my eye."

languages.text: "Saçmalık! Acı ne kadar büyük olursa o kadar çabuk ameliyat ediyorsunuz. Tüm üst güverteliler, yepyeni vizörlerle geziyor. Gözümdeki bir zerre yüzünden avam gibi acı çeken bir ben kaldım."
languages.original_text: "Rubbish! The worse the pain, the quicker you lot operate. All the upper-deckers are walking around with brand-new visors. I'm the only one suffering like a pleb over a speck in my eye."

traits.locale_text: "Saçmalık! Acı ne kadar büyük olursa o kadar çabuk ameliyat ediyorsunuz. Tüm üst güverteliler, yepyeni vizörlerle geziyor. Gözümdeki bir zerre yüzünden avam gibi acı çeken bir ben kaldım."

languages.text: “胡说！只有疼得厉害，你们才愿意动手术！上层甲板那些人个个都装上了崭新的目镜，还到处穷显摆，只有我像个贱民似的，为眼里这点沙子受尽折磨！”
languages.original_text: "Rubbish! The worse the pain, the quicker you lot operate. All the upper-deckers are walking around with brand-new visors. I'm the only one suffering like a pleb over a speck in my eye."

traits.locale_text: “胡说！只有疼得厉害，你们才愿意动手术！上层甲板那些人个个都装上了崭新的目镜，还到处穷显摆，只有我像个贱民似的，为眼里这点沙子受尽折磨！”

languages.text: "Unsinn! Je schlimmer der Schmerz, desto schneller arbeitet ihr. Die Oberdecker laufen alle mit nagelneuen Visoren rum. Ich bin der Einzige, der sich mit einem Fleck im Auge rumschlagen muss."
languages.original_text: "Rubbish! The worse the pain, the quicker you lot operate. All the upper-deckers are walking around with brand-new visors. I'm the only one suffering like a pleb over a speck in my eye."

traits.locale_text: "Unsinn! Je schlimmer der Schmerz, desto schneller arbeitet ihr. Die Oberdecker laufen alle mit nagelneuen Visoren rum. Ich bin der Einzige, der sich mit einem Fleck im Auge rumschlagen muss."

languages.text: « Foutaises ! Plus c'est douloureux, plus vous opérez vite, vous autres. Ceux des ponts supérieurs ont tous des viseurs tout neufs. Je suis le seul à souffrir comme un gueux, et pourquoi ? À cause d'une pauvre petite poussière dans l'œil. »
languages.original_text: "Rubbish! The worse the pain, the quicker you lot operate. All the upper-deckers are walking around with brand-new visors. I'm the only one suffering like a pleb over a speck in my eye."

traits.locale_text: « Foutaises ! Plus c'est douloureux, plus vous opérez vite, vous autres. Ceux des ponts supérieurs ont tous des viseurs tout neufs. Je suis le seul à souffrir comme un gueux, et pourquoi ? À cause d'une pauvre petite poussière dans l'œil. »

languages.text: «¡Tonterías! Cuanto mayor es el dolor, antes operan. Todos en las cubiertas superiores tienen visores nuevos, y yo aquí sufriendo como un plebeyo por una mota de polvo en el mío».
languages.original_text: "Rubbish! The worse the pain, the quicker you lot operate. All the upper-deckers are walking around with brand-new visors. I'm the only one suffering like a pleb over a speck in my eye."

traits.locale_text: «¡Tonterías! Cuanto mayor es el dolor, antes operan. Todos en las cubiertas superiores tienen visores nuevos, y yo aquí sufriendo como un plebeyo por una mota de polvo en el mío».
